records.ety: [Orig., a gallows, from a hangman named Derrick. The name is of Dutch origin; D. Diederik, Dierryk, prop. meaning, chief of the people; cf. AS. pedric, E. Theodoric, G. Dietrich. See Dutch, and Rich.]

defs: A mast, spar, or tall frame, supported at the top by stays or guys, and usually pivoted at the base, with suitable tackle for hoisting heavy weights, such as stones in building.
The pyramidal structure or tower over a deep drill hole, such as that of an oil well (also called an oil derrick .
